stemHtml: What are the privileges of a holder of an MCC (Multi-Crew Cooperation) certificate?

options.a: The certificate alone does not grant operating privileges without an ATPL, CPL, or MPL licence.
options.b: To act as both PIC and co-pilot on aircraft requiring a co-pilot.
options.c: To act as PIC on aircraft requiring a co-pilot.
options.d: To act as co-pilot on aircraft requiring a co-pilot.
